jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at NIIT
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
